overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, ascending stairs from a lower level into an open plaza with wet reflective streets, neon holographic advertisements, and a large hover vehicle, then proceeding under a corporate overpass with blue neon lighting. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity ray-traced graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated concrete stairwell leading to upper plaza

events.description: reaches top of stairs and transitions into open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking up illuminated concrete stairs toward the plaza level above

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with integrated lighting strips on the edges
smooth concrete railing wall along the left side of the staircase
large illuminated advertisement showing a red racing vehicle with japanese text
tall palm tree visible at the top of the stairs against the night sky
towering building covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a concrete stairwell looking up toward a futuristic cityscape. The camera ascends the illuminated stairs, passing a large racing car billboard on the right, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertisements and wet reflective pavement

events.description: large hover vehicle with glowing red neon accents comes into view in the plaza center
camera turns right to navigate around the parked hover vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet reflective plaza toward a large parked hover vehicle

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking down the stairs in the opposite direction
futuristic hover vehicle with red neon underglow and tail lights parked in the plaza

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped in large digital advertisements and neon signage
modern glass facade building with illuminated windows reflecting neon lights
large corporate overpass structure with the word ARASAKA visible in gold lettering

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the open plaza, the scene reveals wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights from surrounding skyscrapers. The camera approaches a large hover vehicle with red neon accents parked in the center, navigating around it while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza walkway approaching corporate overpass with food vendors

events.description: approaching the covered area under the Arasaka overpass with blue neon lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza past the hover vehicle toward the covered overpass area

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the left side near the building entrance

entered.detail: small illuminated food stall with menu displays and warm lighting
dark glass building with vertical blue neon accent lighting
horizontal blue neon tubes running along the building facade

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the plaza, the camera passes the hover vehicle and approaches the Arasaka overpass structure. A food vendor cart appears on the right with warm lighting, while more pedestrians populate the walkway. The environment transitions toward a more covered area with prominent blue neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza under corporate overpass with blue neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant cool blue neon as camera moves under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass past pedestrians and a food vendor cart in the blue-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the food vendor cart on the right side
pedestrians in small groups walking along the blue neon-lit walkway

entered.detail: tall glass building with reflective windows showing neon reflections
dark tunnel-like opening leading deeper into the city infrastructure
purple holographic advertisement visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under the Arasaka overpass into a semi-covered plaza dominated by blue neon lighting. The camera passes pedestrians and the food vendor cart while the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with the overpass structure looming overhead and blue light strips illuminating the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a concrete stairwell into a vibrant, neon-drenched city plaza before moving under a looming corporate overpass. It begins by climbing illuminated stairs past a racing car billboard, with the distant glow of skyscrapers framing the ascent. As the camera emerges into the open plaza, the environment opens up to reveal wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon lights and a large hover vehicle with red accents parked in the center. The scene then shifts toward the Arasaka overpass, passing a warmly lit food vendor cart and crowds of pedestrians as the open sky is gradually replaced by architectural structures. Finally, the camera moves beneath the overpass into a semi-covered area where the lighting transitions to a dominant, moody blue neon glow under the heavy overhead concrete.
